tasks.name: Add code-review-graph dependency
tasks.notes: Added code-review-graph>=2.3,<3.0 to requirements.txt, pyproject.toml, and Dockerfile. Package verified on PyPI (latest 2.3.2).

tasks.name: Add enable_graph config setting
tasks.notes: Added enable_graph: bool = Field(default=True) to Settings class after log_format. Added ENABLE_GRAPH=${ENABLE_GRAPH:-1} to docker-compose.yml environment block.

tasks.name: Create src/graph_builder.py
tasks.notes: Created src/graph_builder.py with build_graph(workspace) -> Optional[Any]. Uses code_review_graph.tools.build.build_or_update_graph (full_rebuild=True, postprocess=minimal) then opens GraphStore via get_db_path. Has 30s timeout via ThreadPoolExecutor, lazy imports, and try/except fallback on all errors. Returns None when enable_graph=False.

tasks.name: VERIFY Phase 1
tasks.notes: pytest tests/unit -v: 84 passed, 2 pre-existing failures (TestDryRunEndToEnd::test_gate_passes_with_no_criticals, TestGitHubPath::test_github_dry_run_produces_valid_output) — both fail on missing 'suggestion' field in test fixtures, unrelated to Phase 1 changes. graph_builder.py exists with defensive coding. enable_graph accessible via get_settings(). Dependency in all three files.
